tr.td: Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows significant hyperglycemia with normal HbA1c, suggesting possible acute or stress-related glucose elevation. There is marked dyslipidemia: high total cholesterol, LDL, triglycerides, and low HDL, increasing cardiovascular risk. Renal function, electrolytes, and urine microalbumin/creatinine ratio are within normal limits. Recommend further evaluation for diabetes and aggressive management of lipid abnormalities.
Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
